sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91511" key="pulwriko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῠλωρ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n91511.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of a warder</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aen.Tact.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">28</biblScope> </bibl> tit.</sense> </entryFree>
